text: The most important things in this app are first of all. It's local. It's cheap. It costs zero dollars. It's fast. And it's going to make me 700 dollars.
expectedOutput:
The most important things in this app are:
• It's local.
• It's cheap.
• It costs zero dollars.
• It's fast.
• It's going to make me 700 dollars.

text: Here are the next steps. Freeze scope. Rerun QA. Ship the build. Send notes.
expectedOutput:
Here are the next steps:
• Freeze scope.
• Rerun QA.
• Ship the build.
• Send notes.

text: The key points are basically. Design. Speed. Reliability.
expectedOutput:
The key points are:
• Design.
• Speed.
• Reliability.

text: The reasons are clear. Lower cost. Faster setup. Better retention.
expectedOutput:
The reasons are clear:
• Lower cost.
• Faster setup.
• Better retention.

text: The benefits are to be clear. Faster setup. Lower cost. Cleaner rollout.
expectedOutput:
The benefits are:
• Faster setup.
• Lower cost.
• Cleaner rollout.

text: The next steps are obvious. Freeze scope.
expectedOutput: The next steps are obvious. Freeze scope.

text: It's local. It's cheap. It's fast.
expectedOutput: It's local. It's cheap. It's fast.

text: The action items are clear. Freeze scope. Ship the build. And send notes.
expectedOutput:
The action items are clear:
• Freeze scope.
• Ship the build.
• Send notes.

text: There are five things that matter. It's local. It's private. It's fast.
expectedOutput:
There are five things that matter:
• It's local.
• It's private.
• It's fast.

text: The problems are obvious. Latency. Cost. Reliability.
expectedOutput:
The problems are obvious:
• Latency.
• Cost.
• Reliability.
